reviews.review_description: This is a really nice game. Very nice design, good voice acting and interesting fun puzzles in a laid back atmosphere. Recommended. This is a must for puzzle aficionados!

reviews.review_title: Good puzzles and a great story
reviews.review_description:
I like puzzles that are congruent with the setting ... it makes sense for this problem to be in this place.  And this game passes that test with flying colors.
I like games that test my powers of observation (noticing small and non-obvious details) and inference (recognizing potential connections and things that might help).  And, again, this game does very well.  The game also  does a good job of skill development, with the first three realms introducing you to the basic gamic operations, and the final three realms giving you real problems to solve.
The biggest surprise for me was the story;  Most stories are merely background (some interesting, some lame) for the game.  Here the progressively exposed back-story was interesting enough to make me pay attention ... and by the end it might have had something to do with the meaning of life!
The role-changing/travel mechanics are interesting.  The chapters are short (easily broken into brief and relatively independent playing sessions).  The guidance hints are enough to point you in the right direction, but never show you the answer you've been missing.

My only disappointment (4 vs 5 stars) was the limited graphics and opportunities for exploration in the six realms we were to visit.
I would recommend this game for smart people but who cares this game is one of the bast games I played in vr it made me interested into puzzle games like this
WHAT ARE YOU DOING READING THE REVIEWS JUST GET THIS MASTERPIECE ALREADY!!
It is good but I what my money back
really good game you go fuse how to do stuff go to youtube go look for a wolf pack it helps you
Fantastic Game about exploring and creative puzzles.
So fun

I was enjoying this but then it stopped working , I could still go between realm and workshop , but it wasn’t recognising my task and one of the info pop ups didn’t disappear 🤷‍♀️ shame as I was enjoying it, maybe if I go back in after a day or two it will resolve ?

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry to hear you had trouble with the game. We're not sure we understand what exactly happened during your run, so it would be great if you could you send us an email at support@innerspacevr.com or reach us on discord so we can help troubleshoot !

reviews.review_description:
Can’t stop playing
But at the very first realm I didn’t know what to do so maybe add some guidance at the start and make the entire game longer I already finished half of it in 1 hour and 30 minutes

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing and for your feedback! 

The latter half of the game is more challenging so it will probably take a bit more time than that to complete it ;) 

Don't hesitate to join our discord or reach us if you have more specific feedback to share, we're curious to hear where you'd have liked to get more guidance.

reviews.review_description: Absolute cinema words can’t describe how much I liked this game like BRO the best

reviews.review_title: Fun and a little harder than I expected
reviews.review_description: The game goes through multiple stages. It has a bunch of interacting stuff maybe to throw you off maybe to not ￼
This is one of the best vr games I have ever played, I cannot even find the words to describe it.
Fantastic (and a bit strange) puzzle game with an interesting narrative. It's a pity that this is not more popular within the VR community.
Beautifully crafted piece of art!

Lovely game that focuses on exploration and has light puzzle elements in it. Shouldnt be too hard as hints are given aswell and the puzzles are overall not too difficult. The main mechanism in the story is also interesting to use. Took me overall about 3.5 to 4hours.
I had loved it when I started playing it .
I truly love this game. Finally a game with good controls. Very lovely puzzler that aged very well. Recommended for everyone that enjoys puzzle games.

This is a adventure/puzzle game. If you enjoyed the fisherman's tale games or ghost giant then you will find plenty to like here. It's a solid little puzzle game with interestin progression. The story is not as memorable as fisherman's tale or curious case of the stolen pets, but still enjoyable.
If you like story driven puzzle games this is for you! It was not too hard or too easy. It’s right along games like the room, fisherman’s tale and shadow point

I bought this game on sale because it looked interesting but I didn't expect much from it. Instead it became my gaming obsession for about a week. Not extremely long but definitely worth the sale price. The puzzles are not brain busting nor super easy though, while offering a subtle commentary upon the "masked"  human condition. 
 I actually enjoy just painting the masks using the add on. 
Great little game. I'd like to see a sequel.
But it was pretty boring. Probably better if you like narrative.

Amazing game, I enjoyed every second of it
If your thinking of buying this game definitely buy it, it’s definitely worth it!

reviews.review_title: I love the game when it works
reviews.review_description: In the beginning when I first launched the game it worked wonderfully. Now I can't do much of anything because it sets my poverty way to tall. I have the floor settings as low a possible but I still can't do anything. I can pick up things but that's it. I try to reset my boundary and switch between stationary and roomscale but nothing is working. It is a beautiful game I just wish I could play past the first 3 mask we make

The making and coloring of mask is great.  The exploring world and finding parts is fun. The puzzles are easy and pretty fun.

The story is boring,  the king is annoying and the ending is Boff

Checked if i could turn down the uninspired music and boring sound but nope

I wanted to write this as a support request, unfortunately I couldn't find a place to request support in the Meta Store or their site.

Consistently on the Quest 3 native version of the game, there is a completey freeze-up on "the Last Memory" FMV event late in the game, right as the FMV walk into the entry room.  The whole screen freezes (very dizzying) and command responses are heavily lagged.  Some of the audio plays, then everything stops for several minutes, then a bit more audio plays.  Actually watching the FMV itself is impossible.

There's a "tearing" effect when you successfully popup the menu or even passthrough.  It just stays visible on the screen (even upside-down? Which confused me) until the next time a button-press is honored.

It is *bypassable*.  The 4th or 5th attempt, about 5 minutes in it finally reached the very end of the FMV where it's viewable again.  And since I could look the FMV up on a youtube LP, I was able to understand the missed story.

I just got a couple friends of mine to buy this game right before stumbling into that bug.  I worry it might be universal to the Quest 3 and not just specific to my copy.

developer_response.body:
Now in touch with via support email. We're aware of the issue, we're working on a fix and we should be able to update the game soon!
EDIT: We have just pushed an update (02/27/2024) which fixes the issue among a few other minor fixes. Thank you for your patience and hope you'll like the rest of the game!

reviews.review_description: It's not just creating masks. You're doing ritual dances and weird poses and going to the other realms The guys talk really weird like you're serving other gods. It's just weird y'all. I don't think any Christian will really like this game, just being honest. It just seemed kind of like witchcraft.
IT WONT DOWNLOAD but it seems cool

I really enjoyed the game untill one of the masked characters had broken the restriction bairrer.

Now I have two masked characters side by side therefore, I can't progress to the next level.

I will give full stars when this issue is fixed.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for playing Maskmaker and sorry to hear you had this issue! Could you reach us at support@innerspacevr.com explaining a bit more where did this happened so we can hopefully prevent it to happen furthermore in our next patch. Thanks for your understanding!

reviews.review_description:
Browsing the store, looking for something new to play and I came across this. 

Having enjoyed their first game, A Fisherman's Tale, I didn't need to think about this one for long. 

5 minutes into playing this game, I knew anything I had planned to be productive for the day wasn't going to happen. 

Keep up the good work devs!

Edit: I finished the game, took 5-6 hours and it was fantastic. You guys know how to tell a story!

Maskmaker is my kind of game offering up a unique take on puzzling by having you transfer from body to body, working with yourself to complete objectives.  As we see more clonelikes coming to VR, so far it’s been a treat to see how each developer utilizes that base mechanic with Maskmaker being one of the most engaging ones yet.  With a 6-to-8-hour campaign, a wonderfully in-depth narrative, pleasant visuals and clever puzzles, I recommend this to anyone on whatever they play VR on.  It’s an absolute gem!

VIDEO REVIEW - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u7f3HljuwD4&t=6s

WRITTEN REVIEW - https://www.thevrgrid.com/maskmaker-quest-2/
Storyline was awesome just I got stuck during some parts but I figured it out.price was a little high but overall the game is amazing.

I have since updated the app and it is working perfectly. The developer got in touch immediately,which I find quite impressive . The game is fun, colorful, and the puzzles are not too difficult.So glad I purchased this game!
I accidentally glitched out the map and the game auto saved and there’s no way for me to progress in the game. Please fix this but overall a great game.

developer_response.body: Hello, we're sorry to hear you had this issue. Could you reach us at support@innerspacevr.com explaining a bit more where did the glitch happened so we can hopefully prevent it to happen furthermore in our next patch. Thanks for your understanding!

reviews.review_title: I really like it, but wow it’s glitchy.
reviews.review_description:
This is so much fun and a great story.  This really is fantastic.  The different lands and places and puzzles are absolutely incredible.  The characters unravel themselves slowly but the story line is always moving.  There are so many layers to this game.

But… mine is super glitchy.  Not just a little here and there, but all over.  Parts of the landscape disappear and reappear.  Things are always getting stuck.  The screen bounces up and down sometimes.  Don’t even try pausing and restarting.  It won’t work. Just quit and restart.  Several times I have to leave the game and start it over because it gets so stuck.

There really needs to be an option to turn off the subtitles.  They’re very big and usually block big chunks of the view.  Often times blocking an important scene.

Despite some major issues, I would still 100% recommend this game!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback and sorry to hear you had some issues with the game, especially in this specific level.

For your info, there is an option to turn off subtitles. It is in the main menu at the start of the game: In 'Settings' > 'Languages' section > Then, you can just uncheck the 'Subtitles' box.

Now, as for the other issues, It's a bit unclear why how you had the screen that 'bounces up and down'. We would love to get a more detailed feedback about this issue so don't hesitate to shoot us an email at support@innerspacevr.com or on our discord phttps://discord.gg/UEDHKvrQ, we'd be happy to help and investigate!

reviews.review_description: I absolutely loved the game, and played forever, until I came to dapple murk. The game completely freezes and I can’t continue. All you see is a black screen with the white mask .It never goes past that, but you can hear the birds chirping .

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing the game and taking the time to report. Sorry to hear you had to stop playing because of this black screen issue. It seems similar to what other users are experiencing so it is probably related to a recent update of the Quest firmware that is causing our engine to crash. We're currently working on it and as soon as we have a fix we'll keep you posted here. Thanks for your patience!

reviews.review_description: This is my favorite game that combined adventure, creative problem solving skills , fantasy and magical worlds all in one. I actually wish there was more to explore this game is so addicting I’m sad I finished it. It’s definitely got a pretty long game play but I found myself playing it in any free time that I had and couldn’t wait to get back to it.

reviews.review_title: Good game but there is a issue
reviews.review_description: I've been playing it but at the time I got to the tower I wasn't able to get the blue print of the guard outside. (in the swamp)

developer_response.body: Hello, we're sorry to hear you had this issue. Could you reach us at support@innerspacevr.com explaining a bit more where did the issue happened so we can hopefully prevent it to happen furthermore in our next patch. Thanks for your understanding!

reviews.review_description: This game is a great mystery puzzler with a good story line.  You are so interactive with this game I hate that I finished.  The puzzlers are not too difficult but you have to listen and use what is available to you.  Can’t wait for these developers to create another game.  Always delivers the best in puzzle VR.  I highly recommend this game to everyone who likes interactive puzzles.  I will be playing it again.

Just finished and feels like it is not only a good game, but also a lovable  experience. Specially liked that you can play in bite size. You can solve 2-3 puzzles, then, have a break, do other things while thinking about the solution of the next puzzle, and then, return, and it won't spoil the experience.  Tons of puzzles, so can be re-played later, too.
And special thanks for not just simply ending the story but adding an epilog, as well.
I think it was worth every penny and thank to everyone who participated in creating this game. You did an excellent quality piece.
